architectReview.evidence: Architect review agent://93-G002ArchitectFinal approved G002 with CLEAR architecture/product/code and zero blockers. Cleanup rerun agent://90-G002CleanupRerun reported AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: CLEAR. Review confirmed package+draft scoped recovery records, reload/relogin restoration, resend through autosave PATCH, recovery clearing only after successful PATCH or same-body persisted evidence, saved-body baseline update after PATCH, and draft-replacing actions blocked while recoveryAvailable is true.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA/red-team agent://94-G002QaFinal found zero blockers across session-expiry 401, transient autosave failure, reload/relogin restore, resend, clear-only-after-success, malformed/stale local records, package+draft scoping, and draft-replacing actions. Leader verification passed focused Biome, focused P3 contract tests, full npm test, and typecheck after the final restore-original guard.

artifactRefs.description: G002 focused and full verification receipts, review refs, coverage, and adversarial autosave recovery notes.
Browser automation transcript with selector-bearing actions and platform-unavailable fallback details for the G002 web editor surface.
Non-uniform PNG visual fallback artifact for the G002 editor autosave recovery web surface when Chromium automation dependencies are unavailable.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G002 objective: failed draft autosave content must be saved locally
contractCoverage.obligation: Persist current draftBody locally under a package+draft scoped key when autosave PATCH fails, including session-expiry 401 before redirect.
Load a valid local recovery record for the same package+draft after session/detail load and restore its body when it differs from server body.
Recovered local draftBody must flow through the same autosave PATCH path without a separate manual rescue action.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G002 objective: cleared only after successful persistence
contractCoverage.obligation: Remove local recovery only after successful PATCH or when loaded server body already equals the recovery body; never clear on autosave failure or draft-replacement attempts while recovery is pending.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G002 objective: package+draft scoped recovery and safe malformed handling
contractCoverage.obligation: Reject malformed, wrong-schema, wrong-package, or wrong-draft local records instead of restoring unsafe content.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: Focused P3 contract tests exercise draftRecoveryStorageKey, createDraftRecoveryRecord, and parseDraftRecoveryRecord identity/malformed handling; source inspection confirms localStorage keying and parser validation.
Load effect fetches session/detail, reads package+draft localStorage recovery, restores differing body, flags recoveryAvailable, and clears same-body persisted recovery.
Autosave PATCH sends body_markdown: draftBody; success clears recovery and updates packageData baseline; failure saves recovery locally and redirects on 401 after preservation.
Source and contract tests confirm clearDraftRecovery(packageId, draft.id) is tied to successful PATCH and non-autosave packageData/fixedDraft clear paths are absent.
Generate package, search structure, apply fixes, and restore original call blockDraftReplacementWhileRecovering; package buttons are disabled while recoveryAvailable is true.

adversarialCases.scenario: Autosave PATCH returns HTTP 401 after user edits a loaded draft.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The current body is saved to localStorage before redirecting to /login?from=/packages/<packageId>.

adversarialCases.scenario: Autosave PATCH throws a transient HTTP/network error.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The current body remains in the editor, is written to localStorage, recoveryAvailable is true, and no recovery clear occurs.

adversarialCases.scenario: A valid package+draft scoped local recovery record exists after reload or login return while server draft is older.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The local body is restored and marked as pending recovery.

adversarialCases.scenario: Restored local body differs from server draft body.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Existing autosave schedules PATCH with body_markdown: draftBody and clears local recovery after success.

adversarialCases.scenario: Autosave fails repeatedly and then later succeeds, or server state already equals the recovery body on load.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Recovery persists through failures and clears only after successful persistence/equivalent persisted state.

adversarialCases.scenario: localStorage contains invalid JSON or a record with wrong schema/types.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The record is ignored and not restored over server body.

adversarialCases.scenario: localStorage contains a valid record for another package or another draft.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The record is not restored for the current package+draft.

adversarialCases.contractRef: G002 pending recovery draft replacement protection
adversarialCases.scenario: While recoveryAvailable is true, user invokes generate package, search structure, apply fixes, or restore original.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The action is blocked with pending-local-recovery status rather than overwriting or clearing the recovered body.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: agent://90-G002CleanupRerun CLEAR with no blocking/advisory findings after earlier blockers were fixed. Full blocking verification loop reran cleanly: focused Biome OK, focused P3 contract tests passed, typecheck passed, full npm test passed with 10 files and 123 tests, architect review agent://93-G002ArchitectFinal CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR APPROVE, and executor QA agent://94-G002QaFinal passed all adversarial cases with zero blockers.
